title: 151 10024 SEALANT, Brown
features: PERMANENT & FAST DRYING: 151 Frame Sealant, for all brown UPVC, wood & metal window frames and doors. Easy to use, fast drying.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Frame Sealant, a brown flexible acrylic based sealant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
PERMANENTLY FLEXIBLE SEALANT: 151 Brown Frame Sealant, remains permanently flexible, suitable for outdoor use
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Frame Acrylic Sealant. Colour: Brown. Size: 310ml. Store at room temperature
